description.short: Personal knowledge base - capture and search thoughts
description.full: Cerebro captures your thoughts, notes, tasks, and ideas via Teams messages. It uses AI to organize, categorize, and make them semantically searchable. Send a message to capture a thought. Use 'done:' prefix to mark tasks complete, 'reopen:' to reopen them.

commands.title: done
commands.description: Mark a task as done (e.g., 'done: update the README')

commands.title: reopen
commands.description: Reopen a completed task (e.g., 'reopen: update the README')

commands.title: delete
commands.description: Delete a thought (e.g., 'delete: old meeting notes')
